title: bontia bontioides
intro: Bontia bontioides, also known as Bontia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. Bontia bontioides is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from digestive problems, fever reduction, and wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or ointment, and can be used fresh or dried for herbal preparations.
